nodes.name: Anthreptes
nodes.summary: Anthreptes（Anthreptes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Anchieta's sunbird、Plain sunbird、褐喉食蜜鸟等14种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-chinned sunbird
nodes.summary: Yellow-chinned sunbird（Anthreptes rectirostris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-chinned sunbird。

nodes.name: Yellow-chinned sunbird
nodes.summary: The yellow-chinned sunbird (Anthreptes rectirostris) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in West Africa, namely Sierra Leone to Ghana. The grey-chinned sunbird (Anthreptes tephrolaemus) was formerly grouped with this species. References External links Image at ADW
